title: Canonical ShipmentRecord (v1)
description: Vendor-agnostic shipment shape every logistics connector normalizes to (kit contract.ts ShipmentRecord). brain.shipments keys on (brand_id, provider, shipment_id).

status.description: canonical lowercase: pickup_scheduled | in_transit | delivered | rto | ...

updated_at.description: ISO8601; may be empty when the provider omits a timestamp
